children.text: the acquisition of unsafeguarded special nuclear material; or
the use, development, production, stockpiling, or other acquisition of any nuclear explosive device,

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: b Prohibition
children.text: To the extent that the United States has jurisdiction to prohibit such activity by such person, no United States person and no foreign person may engage in any prohibited activity.

children.heading: Presidential determination and order with respect to United States and foreign persons
children.label: c Presidential determination and order with respect to United States and foreign persons
children.text: If the President determines,, that a United States person or a foreign person has engaged in a prohibited activity (without regard to whether subsection (b) applies), the President shall, by order, impose the sanctions described in subsection (d) on such person.1So in original.1

children.heading: Ban on dealings in Government finance
children.label: 1 Ban on dealings in Government finance

children.heading: Designation as primary dealer
children.label: A Designation as primary dealer
children.text: Neither the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System nor the Federal Reserve Bank of New York may designate, or permit the continuation of any prior designation of, the person as a primary dealer in United States Government debt instruments.

children.heading: Service as depositary
children.label: B Service as depositary
children.text: The person may not serve as a depositary for United States Government funds.

children.label: A
children.text: commence any line of business in the United States in which the person was not engaged as of the date of the order; or

children.label: B
children.text: conduct business from any location in the United States at which the person did not conduct business as of the date of the order.

children.heading: Consultation with and actions by foreign government of jurisdiction
children.label: e Consultation with and actions by foreign government of jurisdiction

children.heading: Consultations
children.label: 1 Consultations
children.text: If the President makes a determination under subsection (c) with respect to a foreign person, the Congress urges the President to initiate consultations immediately with any appropriate foreign government with respect to the imposition of any sanction pursuant to this section.

children.heading: Suspension of period for imposing sanctions
children.label: A Suspension of period for imposing sanctions
children.text: In order to pursue consultations described in paragraph (1) with any government referred to in such paragraph, the President may delay, for up to 90 days, the effective date of an order under subsection (c) imposing any sanction.

children.heading: Coordination with activities of foreign government
children.label: B Coordination with activities of foreign government
children.text: Following consultations described in paragraph (1), the order issued by the President under subsection (c) imposing any sanction on a foreign person shall take effect unless the President determines, and certifies in writing to the Congress, that the government referred to in paragraph (1) has taken specific and effective actions, including the imposition of appropriate penalties, to terminate the involvement of the foreign person in any prohibited activity.

children.heading: Extension of period
children.label: C Extension of period
children.text: After the end of the period described in subparagraph (A), the President may delay, for up to an additional 90 days, the effective date of an order issued under subsection (b) imposing any sanction on a foreign person if the President determines, and certifies in writing to the Congress, that the appropriate foreign government is in the process of taking actions described in subparagraph (B).

children.label: A
children.text: the status of consultations under this subsection with the government referred to in paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: the basis for any determination under paragraph (2) that such government has taken specific corrective actions.
remain in effect for a period of not less than 12 months; and

children.label: A
children.text: the person has ceased to engage in any prohibited activity; and

children.label: B
children.text: the President has received reliable assurances from such person that the person will not, in the future, engage in any prohibited activity.

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: g Waiver
children.text: The President may waive the continued application of any sanction imposed on any person pursuant to an order issued under subsection (c) if the President determines, and certifies in writing to the Congress, that the continued imposition of the sanction would have a serious adverse effect on the safety and soundness of the domestic or international financial system or on domestic or international payments systems.
any violation of subsection (b); or
any order issued pursuant to subsection (c).

children.label: A
children.text: such person is aware that such person is engaging in such conduct, that such circumstance exists, or that such result is substantially certain to occur; or

children.label: B
children.text: such person has a firm belief that such circumstance exists or that such result is substantially certain to occur.

children.heading: Knowledge of the existence of a particular circumstance
children.label: 2 Knowledge of the existence of a particular circumstance
children.text: If knowledge of the existence of a particular circumstance is required for an offense, such knowledge is established if a person is aware of a high probability of the existence of such circumstance, unless the person actually believes that such circumstance does not exist.

children.heading: Scope of application
children.label: j Scope of application
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to prohibited activities which occur on or after the date this subchapter takes effect.
